subcodes.first_line: Praise and glory be unto the Beloved of the horizons, Who on the Day of Separation seized the people of hypocrisy and illumined them with the light of unity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد و ثنا محبوب آفاق را که در یوم طلاق اهل نفاق را اخذ نمود و بنور اتفاق
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @corruption; misinterpretation of the Word of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @justice and wrath of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @prayer for protection, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
